welcome.title: Ethnocare Online Tool
welcome.description: Select the tool you want to use
welcome.description1: The sizing tool aims to guide you in finding the right size of Ethnocare product.
welcome.description2: The assistance tool provides help and support for using Ethnocare products.
welcome.description3: The return tool allows you to manage returns and exchanges of Ethnocare products.
welcome.description4: The FAQ tool provides answers to frequently asked questions about Ethnocare products.
welcome.description5: The recommendation tool helps you find the best Ethnocare products based on your needs.

welcomeRecommendation.title: Solution Finder
welcomeRecommendation.description: Answer the following questions to get a personalized product recommendation.
